    Compiles the syntax tree into a ICompiledProgram.

    Compiles a syntax tree into a compiled program.
    compile(ISyntaxTree, IInstructionSet) - Method in class dk.tij.registermaschine.core.compilation.ConcreteCompiler
    Compiles the given ISyntaxTree into a ICompiledProgram.

    Compiles source code using the provided instruction set.

    Compiles source code using the global instruction set.
